recipes.name: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Soft, chewy chocolate chip cookies that are perfect for any occasion. Made with brown butter for extra flavor depth.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
  2. In a large bowl, cream together butter and both sugars until light and fluffy, about 3-4 minutes.
  3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add vanilla extract.
  4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
  5. Gradually mix dry ingredients into wet ingredients until just combined.
  6. Fold in chocolate chips.
  7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto prepared baking sheets, spacing 2 inches apart.
  8. Bake for 9-11 minutes until edges are golden brown but centers still look slightly underbaked.
  9. Let cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to wire rack.

recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Authentic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and black pepper. Creamy without using cream!
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente.
  2. While pasta cooks, heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add pancetta and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
  3. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, Parmesan cheese, and plenty of black pepper.
  4. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining. Drain pasta and immediately add to skillet with pancetta.
  5. Remove from heat. Quickly stir in egg mixture, tossing vigorously to create a creamy sauce. Add pasta water as needed.
  6. Serve immediately with extra Parmesan and black pepper.

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Rich and creamy Indian curry with tender marinated chicken in a spiced tomato sauce.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces. Marinate in yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, and spices for at least 30 minutes.
  2. Heat oil in a large pan. Cook marinated chicken until golden and cooked through. Set aside.
  3. In same pan, sauté onion until softened. Add garlic, ginger, and spices. Cook for 1 minute.
  4. Add tomato sauce and cook for 5 minutes. Stir in heavy cream and return chicken to pan.
  5. Simmer for 10-15 minutes until sauce thickens. Season with salt.
  6. Serve over basmati rice with fresh cilantro and naan bread.

recipes.name: Classic Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with homemade Caesar dressing, parmesan cheese, and crunchy croutons.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Make croutons: Cut bread into cubes, toss with olive oil and garlic. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes until golden.
  2. For dressing: Mash anchovies and garlic into paste. Whisk in lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
  3. Slowly whisk in olive oil until emulsified. Stir in Parmesan cheese and black pepper.
  4. Wash and dry romaine lettuce. Tear into bite-sized pieces.
  5. Toss lettuce with dressing until well coated. Top with croutons and additional Parmesan.
  6. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Seasoned ground beef tacos with fresh toppings and homemade salsa. Perfect for Taco Tuesday!
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground beef and cook, breaking up with spoon, until browned.
  2. Add onion and cook until softened. Stir in garlic, cumin, chili powder, paprika, and salt. Cook 1 minute.
  3. Add tomato sauce and simmer 5 minutes until thickened.
  4. Warm tortillas in dry skillet or microwave.
  5. Fill tortillas with beef mixture. Top with cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, sour cream, and salsa.
  6. Serve with lime wedges and hot sauce.

recipes.name: Pancakes
recipes.description: Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for weekend breakfast. Serve with maple syrup and butter.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
  2. In another bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, melted butter, and vanilla.
  3. Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and stir until just combined. Don't overmix - lumps are okay.
  4. Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat. Lightly grease with butter.
  5. Pour 1/4 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes.
  6. Flip and cook until golden brown, 1-2 minutes more.
  7. Serve hot with maple syrup, butter, and fresh berries.

recipes.name: Grilled Salmon
recipes.description: Perfectly seasoned grilled salmon with lemon and herbs. Light, healthy, and delicious.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Clean and oil grates.
  2. Pat salmon fillets dry and season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
  3. Brush with olive oil and sprinkle with fresh dill.
  4. Grill skin-side down for 4-5 minutes. Flip carefully and grill 3-4 minutes more until fish flakes easily.
  5. Remove from grill and immediately squeeze fresh lemon juice over top.
  6. Serve with grilled vegetables or rice pilaf.

recipes.name: Vegetable Stir Fry
recipes.description: Colorful mixed vegetables stir-fried with garlic and ginger in a savory sauce.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Prepare all vegetables: slice bell peppers, snap peas, carrots, and broccoli into bite-sized pieces.
  2. Mix sauce: combine soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, and red pepper flakes.
  3. Heat wok or large skillet over high heat. Add oil and swirl to coat.
  4. Add harder vegetables first (carrots, broccoli) and stir-fry 2-3 minutes.
  5. Add remaining vegetables and continue stir-frying 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender.
  6. Pour sauce over vegetables and toss to coat. Cook 1 minute more.
  7. Serve immediately over steamed rice with sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Banana Bread
recipes.description: Moist and tender banana bread made with overripe bananas. Perfect for breakfast or snacking.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
  2. In a large bowl, mash ripe bananas until smooth.
  3. Mix in melted butter, sugar, egg, and vanilla until combined.
  4. In separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
  5. Gradually stir dry ingredients into banana mixture until just combined. Don't overmix.
  6. Pour batter into prepared loaf pan and smooth top.
  7. Bake 60-65 minutes until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
  8. Cool in pan 10 minutes before turning out onto wire rack.

recipes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.description: Comforting homemade chicken noodle soup with tender vegetables and hearty egg noodles.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. In a large pot, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion, carrots, and celery. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
  2. Add garlic and cook 1 minute more.
  3. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a boil. Add bay leaves and thyme.
  4. Add chicken breasts and simmer 20 minutes until cooked through.
  5. Remove chicken, shred when cool enough to handle, and return to pot.
  6. Add egg noodles and cook according to package directions.
  7. Season with salt and pepper. Remove bay leaves before serving.
  8. Garnish with fresh parsley.

recipes.name: Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh mozzarella, basil, and tomato sauce on homemade dough.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Preheat oven to 500°F (260°C) with pizza stone if available.
  2. Roll out pizza dough on floured surface to desired thickness.
  3. Transfer to pizza pan or parchment paper.
  4. Spread tomato sauce evenly, leaving 1-inch border for crust.
  5. Tear fresh mozzarella into pieces and distribute over sauce.
  6. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
  7. Bake 10-12 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
  8. Remove from oven and immediately top with fresh basil leaves.
  9. Let cool 2-3 minutes before slicing and serving.

recipes.name: Greek Salad
recipes.description: Fresh Mediterranean salad with cucumbers, tomatoes, olives, and feta cheese.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Cut tomatoes into wedges and cucumbers into thick slices.
  2. Slice red onion thinly. Cut bell pepper into strips.
  3. Combine vegetables in large bowl with olives.
  4. For dressing: whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper.
  5. Pour dressing over salad and toss gently.
  6. Top with crumbled feta cheese.
  7. Let marinate 15 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.

recipes.name: Pad Thai
recipes.description: Classic Thai stir-fried noodle dish with sweet, sour, and salty flavors.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Soak rice noodles in warm water until soft, then drain.
  2. Whisk together fish sauce, tamarind paste, sugar, and rice vinegar for sauce.
  3. Heat oil in wok over high heat. Add garlic and stir-fry 30 seconds.
  4. Add shrimp and cook until pink. Push to one side of wok.
  5. Add eggs and scramble. Add noodles and sauce, tossing to combine.
  6. Add bean sprouts and scallions. Toss for 2 minutes.
  7. Serve with lime wedges, crushed peanuts, and cilantro.

recipes.name: Korean Bibimbap
recipes.description: Mixed rice bowl with seasoned vegetables, meat, and gochujang sauce.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Cook rice and keep warm. Marinate beef in soy sauce, sesame oil, and garlic.
  2. Blanch spinach and season with sesame oil and salt. Julienne carrots and cucumber.
  3. Sauté mushrooms and bean sprouts separately with garlic.
  4. Cook marinated beef until browned and cooked through.
  5. Fry eggs sunny-side up with runny yolks.
  6. Arrange rice in bowls, top with vegetables, meat, and fried egg.
  7. Serve with gochujang and sesame oil on the side.

recipes.name: French Onion Soup
recipes.description: Rich, caramelized onion soup topped with gruyere cheese and crusty bread.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Slice onions thinly. Melt butter in large pot over medium heat.
  2. Add onions and cook slowly, stirring occasionally, for 45-60 minutes until deeply caramelized.
  3. Add thyme and garlic, cook 1 minute. Add wine and cook until reduced by half.
  4. Add beef stock and simmer 20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
  5. Preheat broiler. Ladle soup into oven-safe bowls.
  6. Top with bread slices and grated gruyere cheese.
  7. Broil until cheese is golden and bubbly. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Japanese Miso Ramen
recipes.description: Hearty ramen soup with rich miso broth, tender pork, and fresh toppings.
recipes.instructions:
Instructions

  1. Prepare ramen eggs by soft-boiling eggs and marinating in soy sauce mixture.
  2. Make tare by mixing miso paste, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
  3. Heat chicken stock and add miso tare, stirring to combine.
  4. Cook ramen noodles according to package directions, drain.
  5. Slice char siu pork and green onions. Prepare nori and bamboo shoots.
  6. Place noodles in bowls, ladle hot broth over top.
  7. Arrange toppings: pork, egg, green onions, nori, and bamboo shoots.
